title: Xiamen, Fujian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Xiamen, Fujian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Xiamen is a city in Fujian with a population of 5,160,000. A coastal city known for its subtropical climate, colonial Gulangyu Island, and role as a special economic zone and trade hub.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
